text: Hello and welcome to Real Easy English,
zh: 大家好,欢迎收听《Real Easy English》,

text: the podcast where we have real conversations in easy English to help you learn. I'm Beth. And I'm Neil.
zh: 这档播客用简单的英语进行真实对话,帮助大家学习英语。我是Beth。我是Neil。

text: You can watch this podcast and test yourself with a worksheet which you can get free on our website at bbclearningenglish .com.
zh: 你可以边看这期节目,边用一份练习题检测自己,练习题可以在我们的网站bbclearningenglish.com上免费获取。

text: So, Neil, how are you today? I'm very well actually.
zh: 那么,Neil,你今天怎么样?我其实感觉挺好的。

text: How are you feeling about our recording today? Feeling confident?
zh: 你对今天的录制感觉怎么样?有信心吗?

text: I'm feeling confident. Are you feeling nervous? Not at all.
zh: 我很有信心。你紧张吗?一点也不紧张。

text: No, I'm feeling confident. Well, today we're talking all about confidence.
zh: 不紧张,我很有信心。好,今天我们就来聊聊“自信”这个话题。

text: So listeners might be familiar with the adjective confidence, which means being certain about something, feeling good about
zh: 听众们可能对形容词confident比较熟悉,它的意思是对某事有把握、感觉良好、

text: yourself. But confidence is the noun
zh: 对自己有信心。不过confidence是名词形式,

text: and it's that feeling of being certain, maybe about your own abilities or about a situation.
zh: 指的是那种确信的感觉,可能是对自己能力的确信,也可能是对某种情形的确信。

text: OK, that's a good description, Beth.
zh: 好,这个解释很到位,Beth。

text: Would you say you are a confident person? I think it really depends on the situation.
zh: 你觉得自己是个自信的人吗?我觉得这真的要看情况。

text: So if I am speaking with you like this I'm very confident I know you
zh: 如果像现在这样跟你说话,我会很自信,因为我了解你,

text: but if I'm around people that I don't know as much then I usually feel a bit more shy
zh: 但如果是和我不太熟悉的人在一起,我通常会更害羞一点。

text: yeah what about you are you generally confident
zh: 嗯,那你呢,你一般来说自信吗?

text: I think like you if I think I know what I'm doing then I'm confident
zh: 我觉得跟你差不多,如果我知道自己在做什么,我就会有信心,

text: but if I'm doing something something, especially with people who maybe know more about that thing than I do,
zh: 但如果我在做某件事,尤其是身边的人比我更懂这件事的时候,

text: then that can be nerve -wracking, make you feel nervous and then not be confident.
zh: 那就会让人很紧张,会让你感到不安,从而变得不自信。

text: Yeah, definitely. I remember like being in a class, in a classroom,
zh: 是的,确实如此。我记得在课堂上,

text: and if I feel like this topic is just, I don't know then I would not feel confident at all
zh: 如果我觉得这个话题我完全不了解,那我就会完全没信心,

text: definitely feel nervous what other types of situations would make you feel shy or nervous
zh: 肯定会感到紧张。还有哪些情况会让你感到害羞或紧张呢?

text: I think apart from meeting new people I always feel a bit nervous with that
zh: 我觉得除了认识新朋友会让我紧张之外,

text: I'm generally quite confident so if it comes to something like public speaking
zh: 我一般来说是挺自信的,所以如果是像公开演讲这种情况,

text: where I have to talk in front of a lot of people if they're people I don't know know,
zh: 要在很多人面前讲话,如果那些人是我不认识的,

text: I don't really have a problem, I'm quite confident.
zh: 我倒没什么问题,我会很自信。

text: But if I had to speak to a room of people and I know the people, that would make me more nervous.
zh: 但如果要在一屋子我认识的人面前讲话,那我反而会更紧张。

text: I don't know if that's weird. Maybe. I think I'm probably the opposite.
zh: 我不知道这算不算奇怪。也许吧。我觉得我可能正好相反。

text: Really? If I talk to people I don't know, I don't feel very confident unless I'm very well prepared.
zh: 真的吗?如果我和不认识的人说话,除非我准备得很充分,否则我会不太自信。

text: I think being prepared is a good way to boost your confidence.
zh: 我觉得做好准备是提升自信的一个好方法。

text: Yeah. I remember watching a video about a lady saying,
zh: 是的。我记得看过一个视频,里面一位女士说,

text: if you want to improve your confidence, to boost your confidence, you should stand in a power stance
zh: 如果你想提升自信,想增强信心,你应该摆出一个“力量姿势”,

text: and think about all the good things that you're going to do. And it will make you confident with your hands on your hips.
zh: 想着你将要做成的所有好事。双手叉腰,这会让你感到自信。

text: And she said if you're going to do public speaking or something, that's really can be quite scary
zh: 她还说,如果你要进行公开演讲之类的事情,这可能会让人很害怕,

text: She said even just go to the toilet stand in the toilet And do it
zh: 她说,哪怕只是去一下洗手间,站在洗手间里做这个动作,

text: on your own and apparently it increases your confidence.
zh: 独自一人做,据说也能提升你的自信心。

text: Well, I must try that So Neil are there any situations where you wish you were more confident?
zh: 好,那我一定要试试。那么Neil,有没有什么情况是你希望自己能更自信一点的?

text: maybe I I mean, I have a lot of experience of driving and I'm quite confident
zh: 也许有。我是说,我开车经验很丰富,开车方面我很自信,

text: driving, but driving abroad, driving especially in a foreign city can be nerve wracking.
zh: 但在国外开车,尤其是在陌生的城市开车,会让人很紧张。

text: And yeah, I think it would be nice to be more confident driving abroad.
zh: 是的,我觉得如果在国外开车时能更自信一些就好了。

text: I was just thinking about language learning. I wish
zh: 我刚才在想学语言这件事。我希望

text: I was more confident when it came to speaking, but I feel so shy and nervous.
zh: 在说外语的时候能更自信一点,但我总是感到很害羞、很紧张。

text: if I'm unless I'm in say like a language class
zh: 除非是在语言课堂上,

text: then I'll be okay but if I'm in the real world and I have to speak to someone in Spanish for example I get really nervous
zh: 那样我会没事,但如果是在现实世界中,比如我必须用西班牙语和别人交流,我就会非常紧张。

text: I have so much respect for people like our audience
zh: 我非常敬佩像我们听众这样的人,

text: because they speak a foreign language and that's a really hard thing to do
zh: 因为他们能说一门外语,这真的是件很不容易的事,

text: nerve -wracking you need confidence and you know well done to you because it's not easy It's not easy at all.
zh: 很让人紧张,需要有信心,所以要为你们点赞,因为这真的不容易。真的一点也不容易。

text: Let's recap some of the vocabulary we heard during the conversation.
zh: 我们来回顾一下这次对话中出现的一些词汇。

text: We had confidence, which means certain or comfortable.
zh: 我们学到了confident,意思是确信的、感觉自在的。

text: And we also had the noun confidence, which means that feeling or quality of being certain.
zh: 我们还学到了名词confidence,指的是那种确信、自信的感觉或品质。

text: We heard the word shy, which describes a person who feels nervous or uncomfortable around other people.
zh: 我们听到了shy这个词,用来形容一个人在他人面前感到紧张或不自在。

text: If something is nerve -wracking, it's very stressful or worrying.
zh: 如果某件事是nerve-wracking,意思是它让人非常紧张或担忧。

text: If something boosts your confidence, it makes you feel more confident.
zh: 如果某件事boosts your confidence,意思是它让你更有信心。

text: And that's it for this episode of Real Easy English.
zh: 这就是本期《Real Easy English》的全部内容。

text: Head over to our website for more episodes bbclearningenglish .com Join us then. Bye.
zh: 欢迎前往我们的网站bbclearningenglish.com收听更多节目。我们下次再见,拜拜。
